name: Old Cataract Terrace
desc: Victorian colonial elegance, wicker chairs, gin & tonic at sunset, Agatha Christie mystery vibes.

name: Philae Temple at Dusk
desc: Island of Isis, water reflections, sacred geometry, ancient lights, mystical shadows.

name: Elephantine Island Rocks
desc: Giant smooth black granite boulders, primeval river, alien landscape, deep silence.

name: Felucca at Golden Hour
desc: White sails against orange sky, slow movement, romantic longing, wind in linen.

name: Nubian House (Gharb Soheil)
desc: Vibrant blue and yellow patterns, symmetrical domes, quirky local soul, cinematic color palette.

name: Kitchener's Garden
desc: Lush emerald palms, exotic birds, botanical sanctuary in the middle of a desert river.

name: Tombs of the Nobles (Night)
desc: Hillside honeycomb of ancient rock, torchlight, sand-swept stairs, archaeological mystery.

name: Aswan High Dam
desc: Massive concrete brutalism, engineering godhood, vast scale, cold industrial power.
